title: 刚刚，DeepSeek大升级，V4真的不远了｜附体验细节
content: DeepSeek’s web client has quietly added “Fast” and “Expert” modes, indicated by lightning and diamond icons. Fast mode, likely a lightweight V4 Lite, is quick, supports images and files, but less accurate on complex reasoning. Expert mode routes to a larger V4 model, offering higher accuracy on physics and logic tasks, though it currently lacks file and multimodal support. A future Vision mode may add true multimodal capability. The split signals a shift toward product stratification, balancing free access with potential future paid or quota‑based tiers.

title: OpenAI 首席科学家 Ilya 偷拍 70 页文件指控 CEO 奥尔特曼习惯撒谎
content: An 18‑month investigation by The New York Times revealed that OpenAI’s chief scientist, Ilya Sutskever, and Anthropic co‑founder Dario Amodei released internal notes alleging that CEO Sam Altman habitually lies. Altman was briefly fired in November 2023 for “inadequate honesty” but reinstated five days later, an incident called “The Blip.” The report, never released, raises doubts about board governance, the collapse of OpenAI’s safety culture, Altman’s opaque equity dealings and his risky geopolitical alliances, especially with Middle East regimes.

content: The Wahaha family’s inheritance dispute shows signs of easing.  During the Qingming holiday, family members including Zong Fuli, her brother-in‑law, and the former president of Wahaha met at their ancestors’ tomb, signaling reconciliation.  In late March, Zong Fuli reached a compromise with Shanghai Cultural Tourism, agreeing to an additional payment of more than 2 billion RMB for a joint project.  Du Jian‑ying also participated in negotiating the sale of shares and agreed to cover over 300 million RMB of the purchase.

title: 全球内存芯片短缺，苹果 Mac mini / Studio 发货严重延迟
content: Apple’s Mac mini and Mac Studio models requiring large memory have significant back‑order delays due to a global shortage of memory chips, driven largely by soaring demand from AI server builds. In the U.S. and China, high‑memory configurations can take up to 4–5 months to ship, with 64 GB M4 Pro Mac mini orders arriving in about 16–18 weeks. Even base models face roughly a one‑month delay, and the 256 GB M3 Ultra Mac Studio also awaits 4–5 months. Prices remain high, and near‑term improvements are unlikely.
eventKey: 全球内存芯片短缺-mac-mini-studio-发货严重延迟

title: 被称为「GPT-4o 之母」的 OpenAI 高管宣布离职
content: OpenAI executive Joanne Jang, known as the “mother of GPT‑4o,” announced her departure after 4½ years, without explaining the reason or her next move. She led the team that gave ChatGPT its core capabilities. Her exit adds to recent executive turnover, which has included multiple departures and disagreements between CEO and CFO over the IPO timeline. With OpenAI valued at $852 billion and preparing to go public, the instability in top management has raised broad concerns about the IPO process.

TrueEV faced a cash flow collapse, was taken over by its financing partner, failed to purchase vehicles for over a year, did not fulfill orders, and clashed with local dealers. title: 携程集团将启动「无理由事假」管理实验
content: Ctrip Group will pilot a “no-reason personal leave” experiment starting May 1, 2026, in selected business units. Approximately 6,000 employees will be randomly assigned to either an experimental or control group. Those in the experimental group can take up to 45 additional paid days per year without needing to provide a reason, in addition to regular paid leave. The policy’s future adoption will depend on the results after one year.

title: Bitcoin and Quantum Computing
content: The discussion examines the potential impact of quantum computing on Bitcoin’s security. It explains how quantum algorithms could break the elliptic‑curve cryptography that secures Bitcoin addresses, potentially allowing attackers to forge signatures. The conversation explores current quantum resistance, possible migration to more secure algorithms, and the timeline for quantum attacks. It also considers the broader implications for blockchain technology and the need for proactive cryptographic upgrades.

title: 当移民助长了恶政的延续
content: The article analyzes how emigration can unintentionally strengthen oppressive governments. When citizens leave, the state gains money through remittances and reduced strain on resources, while loss of domestic opposition weakens resistance. This dynamic allows bad rulers to maintain power longer. The piece discusses historical examples and suggests that migration’s economic benefits can outweigh its impact on political stability, illustrating the complex relationship between population movements and authoritarian resilience.

title: 开源一个给 LLM Agent 用的长期记忆框架： LycheeMem
content: LycheeMem is an open‑source long‑term memory framework for LLM agents, aiming to improve persistence across multi‑turn, multi‑task, and multi‑session scenarios while keeping deployment easy. It supports LangGraph, HTTP MCP, and OpenClaw, and offers compact semantic memory with SQLite + LanceDB, HTTP MCP, and native OpenClaw plugins. The package can be installed with `pip install lycheemem`. Early tests on PinchBench and OpenClaw show about 6 % performance gain and reductions of ~71 % in tokens and ~55 % in cost. The project is available on GitHub.
eventKey: 开源一个给-llm-agent-用的长期记忆框架-lycheemem

title: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: The GitHub repository “forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills” contains a curated list of skills and resources aligned with Andrej Karpathy’s work. It aggregates teaching materials, projects, and code examples covering deep learning, computer vision, and machine learning topics. The content serves as a guide for learners and practitioners to follow Karpathy’s curriculum, including recommended libraries, datasets, and exercises. The repository is well‑maintained, with 7,728 stars and 546 forks.

title: 🔥 Spring-AI 与 Solon-AI 深度对比分析报告
content:
一、框架概述 1.1 共同点概述

Spring AI 与 Solon AI 都是面向 Java 开发者的 AI 应用开发框架，旨在简化大语言模型（LLM）在企业级应用中的集成与开发。尽管两者在设计理念、生态定位和实现细节上有所不同，但它们在核心目标和能力上具有显著的共性：

统一模型接口：两者都提供了统一的 LLM 调用接口，屏蔽底层不同模型供应商（OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、Ollama 等）的 API 差异，实现"一份代码，跨模型运行"
完整的 RAG 链路：均支持从文档加载、切分、向量化、存储到检索重排的完整 RAG 流程…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 梅子酒好吃
eventKey: spring-ai-solon-ai-深度对比分析报告
normalizedTitle: 🔥 spring-ai 与 solon-ai 深度对比分析报告
representativeSources: 开源中国-全部 - 梅子酒好吃

title: 字节跳动开源 Scale-SWE 数据集
content:
中国人民大学高瓴人工智能学院与字节跳动技术团队合作近日完成相关研究，发布 Scale-SWE 数据集。研究团队依托火山引擎的 Sandbox 基建，通过 Sandboxed multi-agent 系统，成功实现 SWE 任务的规模化拓展，构建起包含 100k 真实数据、目前规模最大的开源高质量 SWE 数据集。 基于该数据集蒸馏数据所训练的 Qwen3-30A3B-Instruct 模型，也在 SWE-bench-Verified 评测中取得了 64% 的优异成绩。

根据介绍，研究团队提出了一套在 Sandbox 环境中运行的多 Agent…

title: Balaji on Why AI Raises the Cost of Verification
content: Erik Torenberg interviews Balaji Srinivasan on how AI cuts creation costs but raises verification costs. They explore why AI pushes firms toward a “trusted tribe” model like China’s internet, why physical tasks are easier to automate than digital ones, why shortcuts work mainly for experts, and why AI turns everyone into a CEO rather than eliminating CEOs. The discussion highlights the tension shaping the AI economy.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Erik Torenberg, Balaji Srinivasan)

title: Stellarium v​​26.1 发布
content:
Stellarium 26.1 已发布。Stellarium 是一款免费开源 GPL（自由软件基金会 GNU 通用公共许可证）软件，它使用 OpenGL 图形接口对星空进行实时渲染。软件可以模拟肉眼、双筒望远镜和小型天文等观察天空，根据观测者所处时间和位置，计算出天空中太阳、月球、行星等天体位置，并将其精确地显示出来。还可以绘制星座、演示天文现象，如流星雨、日食和月食等。 Stellarium 还被应用于天文馆中作为教学展示软件，作为天文爱好者星空望远镜观测辅助软件。

此版本的主要变化内容如下：

新增两种 sky cultures
添加了…

title: 基于 Cursor Agent 的流水线 AI CR 实践
content: 在实际迭代开发中，不同需求的代码规模差异很大，有些需求涉及上千行代码，有些则只有一两行。且对于前端的代码验收，主要侧重在界面功能，通过功能验收，没法确保每一行代码都测试到的，以及功能的代码逻辑是否合理，是否健壮、是否规范等问题，都需要通过人工代码 CR 来进一步兜底验收代码的质量，尽量降低业务线上出错的可能。但当面对上千行的代码变更时，人工 CR 也是心有余而力不足。
source: 开源中国-全部 - 白开水不加糖

title: Mesa 就未来开发工作制定了两项 GenAI 政策
content:
基于之前的 Mesa 贡献者指南以及 Mesa 上游开发者之间的讨论，Mesa 现已确定了两项关于生成式人工智能 (GenAI) 的政策，以指导项目未来的开发。 目前，这两项政策已合并到 Mesa 26.1 Git 仓库中，用于规范未来的代码提交。具体如下：

除非达成社区共识，否则 Mesa 将不接受任何通过自主 GenAI 工具自动提交的代码。因此，即使 GenAI 用于生成补丁，也必须由真人发起 Mesa 合并请求并与开发者进行交互。
GenAI 的使用情况也必须公开披露。Mesa 将认可通过生成式 AI/LLM 工具做出的贡献…

title: 我把血检报告喂给AI，这算不算过度分享？
content: Feeding a blood test report to an AI chatbot can provide answers, but it carries risks. Sharing detailed medical records with a language model may expose sensitive health information to uncertainty about data handling, privacy, and accuracy of interpretations. Users should carefully weigh the benefits against potential privacy breaches and inaccuracies before disclosing personal medical data to AI.

title: 面对AI挑战，一些职场人选择直接退休
content: Older professionals, whose careers span the PC, internet, and smartphone eras, are choosing to retire rather than adapt to the rise of artificial intelligence. They view AI as a signal that their occupational roles are becoming obsolete, prompting them to exit the workforce.
eventKey: 面对ai挑战-一些职场人选择直接退休
normalizedTitle: 面对ai挑战 一些职场人选择直接退休

title: 苹果 App Store 今年 Q1 应用提交量同比激增 84%
content: Apple’s App Store saw an 84% year‑over‑year increase in app submissions in Q1 2026, continuing a rising trend since Q1 2025. The growth is largely driven by “ambient programming” tools that auto‑generate code, coupled with new “intelligent agent” programming features added to Xcode. Review times have lengthened, but 90 % of apps are approved within 48 hours, thanks in part to AI‑assisted review, though human oversight remains essential. Apple has tightened oversight to curb low‑quality and malicious apps.
eventKey: app-store-应用提交量同比激增
normalizedTitle: 苹果 app store 今年 q1 应用提交量同比激增 84

title: 品牌纷纷声明“不使用AI”，力求在“AI垃圾”中脱颖而出
content: 为了应对消费者日益增多的怀疑，营销人员开始对未使用AI的内容进行标记。
eventKey: 品牌纷纷声明“不使用ai”-力求在“ai垃圾”中脱颖而出
normalizedTitle: 品牌纷纷声明“不使用ai” 力求在“ai垃圾”中脱颖而出

content: Anthropic has secured a multi‑gigawatt TPU deal with Google and Broadcom, boosting annual revenue past $30 billion and doubling its high‑spend corporate base to over 1,000 clients. OpenAI unveiled a policy plan calling for a public wealth fund, a robot tax, a four‑day work week, and AI usage rights to manage impending super‑intelligence risks. OpenBMB released the open‑source 2‑billion‑parameter VoxCPM2 TTS model. Other highlights include OpenClaw’s new “dreaming” memory feature, OpenAI’s Safety Fellowship program, MiniMax’s upcoming M2.7 release, and Meta’s planned first MSL AI model.
